name: Garlic Soup (Spanish Style)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the garlic and cut into large chunks.
2. Heat the olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add the garlic and bread cubes to the hot oil, sauteing until lightly browned.
4. Pour in the water, salt, pepper, and paprika. Stir gently.
5. Simmer the mixture covered for 5-10 minutes until the bread appears to be dissolving.
6. Crack two eggs into the soup without stirring; let them poach for about 4 minutes.
7. Gently stir the soup before serving.
8. Alternatively, pour the soup into oven-safe dishes and crack an egg into each dish. Place the dishes in a preheated oven until the eggs are set.
